name: create-cmp
description: Scaffold AND maintain production-ready Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform apps (Android + iOS) — conversational interview, toolchain auto-bootstrap, proven-green version-set upgrades, a doctor that heals any KMP project, an AI-native Compose inspector (structured JSON, no screenshots), and a Maestro E2E test harness. Wraps the same deterministic engine as `npx create-cmp-cli` (published npm name; installs the `create-cmp` command).
